Apple TV Setup:
    * Kodi on Apple TV 4k: https://www.koditvbox.tv 
    * RealDebrid with CoCoscrapper and Fenlight (https://umbrellaplug.github.io/)

Living Room TV Setup:
    * Stremio with Torrentio addon https://torrentio.strem.fun/configure
    * Amazon Firestick 4k
    * Using Alldebrid for my girlfriends firestick which seems to work the same.

Peripherals:
    * Razer Death Adder V2
    * Blue Yeti Mic
    * Some Old Webcam
    * Nuphy Halo75 keyboard with G Pro Red 2.0 switches.

Apple Products (Yes I have a lot and I am ashamed):
    * Apple Watch Gen 5
    * Apple Airpods gen 1
    * Apple Airpods Pro 2
    * Apple Airpods Max
    * iPhone 16 Pro
    * iPad 10th gen
